creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Sat Nov  2 15:22:51 2013
New Revision: 332499
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/332499

Log:
  x11-wm/wmconfig: update to 1.4.2
  
  - Update to 1.4.2 [1]
  - Remove unneeded options.mk
  
  PR:		ports/183499 [1]
  Submitted by:	Tommy Scheunemann <net arrishq.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/x11-wm/wmconfig/Makefile
  head/x11-wm/wmconfig/distinfo

Modified: head/x11-wm/wmconfig/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/wmconfig/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 15:20:14 2013	(r332498)
+++ head/x11-wm/wmconfig/Makefile	Sat Nov  2 15:22:51 2013	(r332499)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	wmconfig
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.arrishq.net/files/
 
@@ -24,12 +24,8 @@ NLS_CPPFLAGS=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include
 NLS_LDFLAGS=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 NLS_USES=	gettext
 
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
 post-install:
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${PORTDOCS:S,^,${WRKSRC}/,} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/wmconfig/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 15:20:14 2013	(r332498)
+++ head/x11-wm/wmconfig/distinfo	Sat Nov  2 15:22:51 2013	(r332499)

-SIZE (wmconfig-1.4.1.tar.bz2) = 232351
+SHA256 (wmconfig-1.4.2.tar.bz2) = 41eb431e859b8e7eea3b18e39e70d4f33df156308b86962dedd027239c2cd6a6
+SIZE (wmconfig-1.4.2.tar.bz2) = 245308
